fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Default graph nodes are materially easier to read at the default camera than the current layout. 2. The default layout is more compact horizontally without losing clear parent-to-child hierarchy. 3. Rich LOD nodes use a more cubic presentation and expose more ticket content than the current card.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer][viewer-api] Tighten graph layout and enlarge rich nodes

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Default graph nodes are materially easier to read at the default camera than the current layout. 2. fields.implementation_summary: Tightened the default hierarchy spacing so the graph frames more compactly at the initial camera, increased ticket node dimensions across the minimal, compact, and rich tiers, and reshaped the ticket-viewer rich and compact cards into taller, more cubic summaries with multi-line titles and clearer state and id metadata.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer][viewer-api] Tighten graph layout and enlarge rich nodes
fields.validation_summary: Passed viewer-ctl stop ticket-viewer && cd memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/frontend/dioxus && npm run test:e2e:release -- graph-detail-sidebar.spec.ts.

fields.title: [ticket-viewer][viewer-api] Tighten graph layout and enlarge rich nodes
fields.validation_summary: Previous broad graph suite pass is stale. Revalidated 2026-05-31: ticket 60092819 still fails focused default hierarchical/isometric ordering coverage in graph-detail-sidebar.spec.ts ("graph mode defaults to hierarchical isometric controls and preserves top-to-bottom depth ordering"): child y 557.26 was above the root threshold of 632.96. Because this ticket changes the default graph layout and default-camera readability surface, its current review evidence is contaminated by the same regression; move back to in-implementation until the default-layout fix is rerun.
